case_title: NANCY NEWTON VS. MURPHY, PEARSON, BRADLEY AND FEENEY, A PROFESSIONA

docket_entries.description: SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF NEWTON, NANCY IND/AND AS ADMINISTRATRIX OF THE ESTATE OF DR. HARVEY NEWTON
